questions.q: According to a Reddit headline, who directed the upcoming anti-crypto documentary 'Everyone Is Lying To You For Money'?
The Boston Celtics tied an NBA record with how many 3-pointers in a game?
What kind of author does King Charles reportedly want for the Queen's biography?
Which PlayStation version of Dragon Age: Inquisition will have its servers shut down on April 28, 2026?
What is the name of the hacker group that claimed responsibility for the data breach affecting Rockstar Games?
What is the name of the new content or update for Dome Keeper mentioned in the provided context?
What breakthrough technology in dentistry is being described as potentially transforming tooth repair?
options: A fast 3D-printing method for zirconia dental restorations
A new type of fluoride treatment
questions.correctText: Researchers have developed a fast 3D-printing method for zirconia dental restorations that cuts debinding time to under 30 minutes, allowing for same-day, high-strength customized crowns.

questions.q: Who is reportedly seeking a female author to write the Queen's biography?

According to a statement by Rockstar Games, what was the impact of the recent data breach?
options: Limited access to non-material company information with no impact on organization or players
The theft of all game source codes
A complete shutdown of all online services
questions.correctText: Limited access to non-material company information with no impact on organization or players
